name: Black Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: at least 1/2 cup fresh cilantro leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the couscous in a large bowl.
2. Pour the boiling water over it.
3. Cover the bowl.
4. Let stand for about 20 minutes, or until the couscous has absorbed the water.
5. Add the frozen corn and mix gently.
6. The heat from the couscous will thaw the corn.
7. Add the chopped onion, sliced scallions, halved cherry tomatoes, minced garlic, minced habanero pepper, fresh cilantro leaves, salt, cumin, and rice vinegar to taste.
8. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
9. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
This salad tastes great for lunch or as a side dish.
